heading: Definition of Government publication
label: 1901 Definition of Government publication
text: “Government publication” as used in this chapter, means informational matter which is published as an individual document at Government expense, or as required by law.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesBased on 44 U.S. Code, 1964 ed., § 81a (, , ).Pub. L. 87–579, § 176 Stat. 352Aug. 9, 1962
